title: Bridge Worm: Reborn
description: A lurking predator that hides in the dark and hunts humans to eat
body:
The Bridge Worm mod brings a terrifying new threat to Minecraft from the Trevor Henderson Universe. The Bridge Worm lurks in caves or underneath blocks and disguises itself in stillness with a false face, only revealing its true form when players get too close. When aggressive, the creature will leap towards it's prey and can even destroy blocks. If it kills a victim, it will eat it. It is tied to the even more terrifying Highway Worm, a stronger variant that appears during night on the surface, only once a Bridge Worm has been seen, making encounters even more dangerous the longer you survive.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why are Mobs not spawning?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I disable the Bridge Worm/Highway Worm breaking blocks?

The Bride Worm/Highway Worm breaking blocks can be disabled if you set the gamerule "mobGriefing" to false.

► How to enable the Highway Worm to spawn?

The Highway Worm can be enabled by setting the gamerule "enableHighwayWorm" to true,

It can also be configurated by using the Highway Worm Item which is accessable in creative mode or with cheats.

► Does the mod work with the Long Horse mod?

Yes! The Bridge Worm is compatible with the Long Horse mod since his version 1.0 and the Long Horse Version 1.3. If you see Long Horse, it enable the Highway Worm to spawn, working as a warning.


</details>



![Bridge Worm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb549aec536a6a678f92d7583a2ecd354c88185e.png)

The Bridge Worm is a pale, worm-like creature that spawns in caves or beneath blocks during the night. It remains completely still, but if a player comes within 16 blocks it will turn its head to stalk them. Staring directly at the creature will enable the appearance of Highway Worms later on. Once a player enters within 10 blocks, the Bridge Worm becomes aggressive and reveals its true face. In combat, the Bridge Worm dashes forward while breaking through blocks such as wood, glass, and leaves. It is especially fast in water. Its attacks inflict the Bleeding effect. If it kills an entity, it will consume them.


 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
